tweets: i built this out and the results were wild. full breakdown:
most people won't try this because it seems too simple. that's exactly why it works.
step 1: find the exact thing that's working. don't guess. look at the data.
step 2: set it up. takes 2 hours. stop overthinking the setup.
step 3: run it. measure it. iterate. that's the whole formula.
the formula: open-source 240-antenna array bounce. results speak for themselves.
